metadata.title: Data Annotation — MONAI Label + 3D Slicer + BentoML champion pre-segmentation (#330)

child-plan.critical-rules: - Rule #3: Library-First — use MONAI Label SDK (monailabel) directly. Do NOT reimplement label server. - Rule #17: Annotation flow runs inside Docker. No standalone script fallback. - Rule #22: MONAI_LABEL_PORT=8000 already in .env.example. Use it. - MONAI-Compatibility Mandate: Any segmentation logic uses MONAI transforms/inference, never custom. - Slicer is desktop-only (Option A confirmed): document 3D Slicer plugin install in README/issue. - The champion model pre-segmentation comes from BentoML serving (existing annotation_flow.py logic). - DVC auto-commit on approved annotation (approved mask → DVC add → version tag). - Update issue #330 body with advanced annotation references before implementing.

phase.name: Update GitHub issue #330 with annotation literature
phase.description: Update issue #330 with references to advanced annotation systems kept as future work. Current implementation: MONAI Label + 3D Slicer. Future alternatives documented in issue (not implemented):

task.name: Update issue #330 with advanced annotation references
task.description:
Update issue body to include:
CURRENT IMPLEMENTATION: - MONAILabel (monailabel pip package, https://github.com/Project-MONAI/MONAILabel) - 3D Slicer desktop app connecting to MONAI Label server - BentoML champion model provides initial pre-segmentation mask - Approved masks → DVC auto-commit
FUTURE ALTERNATIVES (not implemented, kept for reference): - SlicerMONAIViz: https://github.com/Project-MONAI/SlicerMONAIViz - SlicerMONAIAuto3DSeg: https://github.com/lassoan/SlicerMONAIAuto3DSeg - Interactive Segmentation Survey: https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.15224 (Shi et al.) - Segment Anything in Medical Images: https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.05622 (MedSAM) - TMI 2025 annotation: https://doi.org/10.1109/TMI.2025.3627954 - CSCWD 2025: https://doi.org/10.1109/CSCWD64889.2025.11033595
UI NOTE: MONAI Label runs a server at http://localhost:8000. The browser UI is minimal (volume list + label management only). Real annotation requires 3D Slicer (desktop app) with the MONAILabel extension installed. This is the expected workflow for any serious annotation work — 3D rotation of vascular microstructures requires a full 3D rendering engine that browsers cannot provide without WebGPU. WebGL could render the volumes but interactive annotation (brush, smart tools) requires significant custom engineering not available in any web-based tool today.

phase.name: MONAI Label server — Docker service
phase.description: MONAI Label runs as a Docker service. The server hosts an "app" (a Python directory that defines which AI models are loaded for annotation assistance). We create a custom MONAI Label app that loads the BentoML champion model for pre-segmentation, then exposes it via the MONAI Label API.

task.name: RED: Tests for MONAI Label service config
task.description:
Create tests/unit/annotation/test_monailabel_config.py:
class TestMonaiLabelConfig: - test_monai_label_port_in_env_example() — grep .env.example for MONAI_LABEL_PORT - test_monai_label_service_in_compose() — parse docker-compose.flows.yml (yaml.safe_load), verify 'monai-label' service exists with MONAI_LABEL_PORT - test_monailabel_app_dir_exists() — deployment/monailabel/minivess_app/ directory present - test_monailabel_app_has_main() — deployment/monailabel/minivess_app/main.py exists - test_monailabel_app_has_model_config() — deployment/monailabel/minivess_app/model/ exists
class TestMonaiLabelDockerfile: - test_monailabel_dockerfile_exists() — deployment/docker/Dockerfile.monailabel exists - test_monailabel_dockerfile_installs_monailabel() — file contains "monailabel" pip/uv install - test_monailabel_port_not_hardcoded() — Dockerfile does not contain "EXPOSE 8000" literal (port comes from compose via MONAI_LABEL_PORT env var)

task.name: GREEN: MONAI Label Docker service
task.description:
1. Create deployment/docker/Dockerfile.monailabel: FROM python:3.12-slim RUN pip install monailabel COPY deployment/monailabel/minivess_app /app/monailabel_app CMD ["monailabel", "start_server", "--app", "/app/monailabel_app", "--studies", "/data/studies", "--port", "${MONAI_LABEL_PORT:-8000}"]
2. Create deployment/monailabel/minivess_app/ — standard MONAI Label app structure: - main.py: MONAILabelApp subclass loading the champion pre-segmenter - model/: empty (models served via BentoML, not local weights) - lib/infers/: Infer class wrapping BentoML champion client - lib/trainers/: Trainer class (stub for active learning future work)
3. Add to deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml: monai-label: build: context: . dockerfile: deployment/docker/Dockerfile.monailabel ports: - "${MONAI_LABEL_PORT:-8000}:${MONAI_LABEL_PORT:-8000}" volumes: - ${DATA_DIR:-./data}:/data/studies - ${MLRUNS_DIR:-./mlruns}:/mlruns environment: <<: *x-common-env MONAI_LABEL_PORT: ${MONAI_LABEL_PORT:-8000} BENTOML_URL: http://${BENTOML_DOCKER_HOST:-minivess-bento}:${BENTOML_PORT:-3333}
4. Add MONAI_LABEL_APP_DIR=/app/monailabel_app to .env.example (if not already).

phase.name: BentoML champion → MONAI Label pre-segmentation bridge
phase.description: The MONAI Label InferTask for the champion model queries BentoML serving. When annotator opens a volume in Slicer, MONAI Label runs pre-segmentation by calling the BentoML endpoint. The mask is returned as the starting point for manual correction.

task.name: RED: Tests for champion pre-segmentation bridge
task.description:
Create tests/unit/annotation/test_champion_infer.py:
class TestChampionInfer: - test_infer_returns_nifti_path(tmp_path) — infer(image_path) returns a .nii.gz path - test_infer_calls_bentoml_client() — mock BentoML client, verify predict() called once - test_infer_handles_bentoml_unavailable(tmp_path) — when BentoML returns error, falls back to zero mask (not exception — graceful degradation for annotation) - test_output_mask_shape_matches_input(tmp_path) — output mask same spatial shape as input - test_output_is_binary_mask(tmp_path) — output values are 0 or 1 only

task.name: GREEN: champion_infer.py

phase.name: Annotation approval → DVC auto-commit
phase.description: When an annotator approves a corrected mask in 3D Slicer, the MONAI Label server saves it to /data/studies/{volume_id}/final_label/. A Prefect task monitors this directory and auto-commits new approved masks to DVC.

task.name: RED: Tests for annotation approval pipeline
task.description:
Create tests/integration/annotation/test_annotation_approval.py:
class TestAnnotationApproval: - test_approved_label_triggers_dvc_add(tmp_path) — simulate approved .nii.gz, verify dvc_add_annotation() called with correct path - test_dvc_version_tag_format() — tag follows "annotation/v{YYYY-MM-DD}-{hash[:8]}" format - test_mlflow_logs_annotation_event() — MLflow run created with annotation metadata - test_approved_count_increments() — after 5 approvals, DVC commit count is 5 - test_annotation_result_has_volume_id() — AnnotationApprovalResult.volume_id matches input

task.name: GREEN: annotation approval Prefect task
3D Slicer plugin documentation
task.description: Create docs/annotation/slicer-setup.md with: 1. Install 3D Slicer (download from slicer.org, all platforms) 2. Install MONAILabel extension from Extension Manager 3. Configure server URL: http://localhost:8000 (or ${MONAI_LABEL_PORT}) 4. Browse volumes, click "Get" for BentoML pre-segmentation 5. Correct mask using Segment Editor tools 6. Click "Submit" to trigger DVC auto-commit 7. Troubleshooting: if Slicer cannot connect, verify docker-compose services running

task.name: Smoke test: MONAI Label server health check
Run full test suite + pre-commit + PR
task.steps: uv run pytest tests/unit/annotation/ -q uv run pytest tests/integration/annotation/ -q -m "not requires_docker" uv run pre-commit run --all-files git checkout -b feat/annotation-flow git add deployment/docker/Dockerfile.monailabel git add deployment/monailabel/ git add src/minivess/orchestration/flows/annotation_flow.py git add tests/unit/annotation/ tests/integration/annotation/ git add docs/annotation/ git commit -m "feat(annotation): MONAI Label + 3D Slicer + BentoML champion pre-segmentation (#330)" git push -u origin feat/annotation-flow gh pr create --title "feat(annotation): MONAI Label + 3D Slicer annotation pipeline" \ --body "Closes #330"
